india_trends.title: PM's appeal: Diesel consumption in agriculture can be scaled back with use of alternative energy, experts say
india_trends.summary: Prime Minister Modi's appeal for reduced fuel use highlights agriculture's significant diesel consumption. Experts advocate for alternative energy sources like biofuels and compressed biogas to lower costs and improve farm profitability.

india_trends.title: CIL's April coal auction quantity drops 6% vs March to 30.5 MT
india_trends.summary: Coal India Limited offered 30.5 million tonnes of coal in April auctions. This marks a slight decrease from March. Global energy prices are high due to West Asia tensions. Power plants are increasing coal use for energy security. Coal India is also allowing buyers from Bangladesh, Bhutan, and Nepal

india_trends.title: UPL Q4 Results: Profit jumps 18% YoY to ₹1,061 crore; company announces 300% dividend payout
india_trends.summary: UPL Limited reported an 18% YoY increase in consolidated net profit to ₹1,061 crore for Q4 FY 2025-26, up from ₹896 crore last year. The QoQ profit rose 168% from ₹396 crore in the previous quarter.

india_trends.title: Explained: What PM Modi’s comments on deferring gold purchases for 1 year mean for yellow metal investors?
india_trends.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi urged Indians to avoid buying gold for the next year, a notable appeal in a country where the metal is deeply tied to savings and tradition. The move is seen as an attempt to ease pressure on India’s foreign exchange reserves, as rising gold imports increase demand for U

india_trends.title: Global Markets | Japan's Nikkei retreats from record high as Iran conflict concerns resurface
india_trends.summary: The benchmark Nikkei 225 Index edged 0.1% lower to 62,666.57, after jumping to an ‌all-time high ⁠of 63,385.04 earlier ⁠in the session. The broader Topix climbed 0.23% to 3,838.26.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | Australian shares slide as banks, CSL drag; US‑Iran tensions hit risk appetite
india_trends.summary: Biotech darling CSL ​tumbled 16% after it slashed its full-year 2026 outlook and flagged a $5 billion impairment. The stock dragged ​the healthcare index 6.5% lower to an over eight-year low.

india_trends.title: Canara Bank Q4 results 2026: Profit declines 10% YoY to ₹4506 crore; recommends dividend of ₹4.20
india_trends.summary: Canara Bank Q4 results 2026: Canara Bank reported a 10% YoY fall in standalone profit to ₹4,505.57 crore. NII rose by nearly 4% YoY and 6% QoQ to ₹9,808 crore, while NIM eased to 2.54% in Q4FY26 from 2.73% YoY.

india_trends.title: Bondada Engineering bags ₹816 crore NTPC solar order, doubles revenue to ₹2,843 crore in FY26
india_trends.summary: This order marks the second from the NTPC Group, bringing Bondada’s total order inflow from the group to about ₹1,207 crore and its combined capacity from NTPC projects to nearly 1 GW

india_trends.title: After winning poll battles, Modi has picked up a new fight
india_trends.summary: Amidst rising crude oil prices and a weakening rupee, Prime Minister Modi has urged Indians to embrace austerity. His call to reduce fuel consumption, postpone gold purchases, and cut edible oil use aims to protect foreign exchange reserves and curb inflation. This wartime economic advisory signals

india_trends.title: After PM Modi’s WFH appeal, Nitin Gadkari has this message for Indians to save fuel amid Iran war
india_trends.summary: Amid escalating Middle East tensions, Prime Minister Modi urged citizens to conserve fuel by reducing petrol and diesel consumption, promoting work-from-home, public transport, and carpooling. He also advised against non-essential foreign travel and gold purchases for at least a year to bolster fore

india_trends.title: Explained: Why PM Modi asked Indians to avoid buying gold for a year and what it means for prices
india_trends.summary: It's no secret that Indians have a long affinity for gold. We are also one of the world's largest consumers, typically importing 90% of the domestic demand. These massive gold imports form a major part of our import bill, especially now that rising prices are also increasing import costs.

india_trends.title: Investors return to FMCG stocks as early signs of demand recovery emerge
india_trends.summary: Early signs of demand recovery and improving earnings outlook drive renewed interest in FMCG stocks after a prolonged phase of underperformance.

india_trends.title: Ambani's Reliance Jio: Businesses and investors of the IPO-bound firm
india_trends.summary: Reliance Jio Platforms, owned by billionaire Mukesh Ambani, is preparing to seek approvals for a Mumbai IPO that could become India’s biggest stock market listing. Reuters reported the offering may raise up to $4 billion, though timelines were delayed due to weaker IPO sentiment after tensions in We

india_trends.title: Quick commerce turns the corner; Karan Taurani picks Eternal, Trent, and Nykaa as top consumption bets
india_trends.summary: India's consumption sector is changing. Companies are now focusing on profits, not just growth. Quick commerce players like Blinkit are leading the way. Quick service restaurants are seeing a recovery. Trent is favored over DMart in retail. The top picks for the next year are Eternal, Trent, and Nyk
